testcase.name: tests.test_client
testcase.error: tests/test_client.py:6: in <module> from yarg import get, HTTPError yarg/__init__.py:49: in <module> from .client import get yarg/client.py:32: in <module> session = requests_futures.sessions.FutureSession() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'requests_futures.sessions' has no attribute 'FutureSession'
